bugs.title: Speech transcribe endpoint missing multipart file interceptor
bugs.description: POST /speech/transcribe uses @UploadedFile but the controller method is missing @UseInterceptors(FileInterceptor('file')). Without it, multer never parses the file, so `file` is always undefined.

bugs.title: Progress streak calculation may miss consecutive days with weekend gaps
bugs.description: computeStreak() checks date === checkDate exactly. If a user studies Mon-Wed then skips Thu but studies Fri, the streak should break at Thu. Current logic uses daily_activity entries which only exist on active days — the check needs to handle missing days correctly.
bugs.fix: Generate a date range and check each consecutive day exists

bugs.title: ModelRouter uses fixed 500 tokens for cost estimation
bugs.description: All AI calls use estimateInputTokens=500 and estimateOutputTokens=500 regardless of actual prompt length. This significantly underestimates lesson generation costs (prompts are ~800 tokens) and overestimates conversation costs.
bugs.fix: Count actual tokens in prompt/response or use model's tokenizer

bugs.title: Conversation history not persisted across server restarts
bugs.description: Conversation sessions are stored in-memory Map in ConversationSessionService. Server restart loses all active conversations, causing WebSocket reconnection to fail on session:restored.
bugs.fix: Persist active sessions to Redis with TTL

bugs.title: Pronunciation alignment assumes same number of reference and spoken words
bugs.description: alignAndScore() uses index-based matching: refWords[i] ↔ spokenWords[i]. If the student speaks more or fewer words than the reference, alignment is wrong after the first mismatch.

bugs.title: Placement test generates same questions every time for same parameters
bugs.description: getOrGenerateQuestions() uses a deterministic hash for question IDs and static question text. Every A1 grammar test gets the exact same question pool.
bugs.fix: Add random seed variation or shuffle options

bugs.title: SM-5 result interval uses previousInterval=0 on first review
bugs.description: When quality < 3 and reps=0, interval is set to 1 regardless. But calculate() uses previousInterval to compute interval for reps >= 3. On first review with zero previousInterval, interval becomes 0 for good reviews after the third repetition.
bugs.fix: Use interval=1 as default when previousInterval is 0

bugs.title: No global rate limiter on any endpoint
bugs.description: Auth endpoints especially POST /v1/auth/login are susceptible to brute-force attacks. No @nestjs/throttler protection anywhere.
bugs.fix: Add @nestjs/throttler with global guard and per-endpoint overrides

bugs.title: ContentValidator safety filter matches substrings in harmless text
bugs.description: Pattern /kill/ matches 'killing time' or 'skill', producing false positives. Word-boundary matching needed.
bugs.fix: Add \b word boundaries to blocked patterns

bugs.title: Lesson cache key ignores user language preferences
bugs.description: Cache key is `lesson:daily:${userId}:${date}`. If user changes nativeLanguage, the cached lesson still uses old language.
bugs.fix: Include native language in cache key

known_limitations: Conversation sessions use Redis — lost on Redis restart (non-persistent Redis)
Deepgram STT returns mock for all audio (no real API called in dev)
ElevenLabs TTS returns mock audio (no real API called in dev)
launch_blockers: Need real API keys in .env (Anthropic, OpenAI, Deepgram, ElevenLabs)
E2E tests require PostgreSQL + Redis running locally
